info.flavor: The principle behind the development of Specter-archetype mechs is a simple one: not being hit is better than the strongest armor. Specters employ cutting-edge optical-electronic camouflage to vanish from the battlefield and enemy scans. They flicker in and out of vision, confusing the eye and the radar. That’s what makes them so deadly, though their weapons certainly help.
info.tactics: Specters are mobile strikers that shine against foes that make the mistake of being caught alone. Use Prowl along with their high Threat and Speed to get them across the front lines so they can find vulnerable solo targets, like snipers and artillery. Specters are permanently Invisible, which is key to their survivability; they aren’t very resilient, but they can Hide any time.
info.terse: Mobile striker that can deal high damage to solo targets.

name: Prowl
effect: The Specter moves spaces equal to Speed, then becomes Hidden. This movement ignores engagement and doesn’t provoke reactions.

actions.name: Prowl
actions.detail: Move spaces equal to Speed, then become Hidden. This movement ignores engagement and doesn’t provoke reactions.

name: Hunt
effect: The Specter’s melee attacks deal +5 damage when no other characters are adjacent to their target.

active_effects.name: Hunt
active_effects.detail: Your melee attacks deal +5 damage when no other characters are adjacent to your target.

name: Fortress
effect: The Specter gains +3 Accuracy on Systems saves, and tech attacks against them receive +3 difficulty.

active_effects.name: Fortress
active_effects.detail: Gain +3 Accuracy on Systems saves, and tech attacks against you receive +3 difficulty.

actions.name: Drain Systems
actions.detail: Make a tech attack against an adjacent character. On a success, the target becomes Stunned. This effect lasts until a character other than you starts their turn adjacent to the target or moves adjacent to the target.

actions.name: Step
actions.detail: Teleport to a free space within line of sight and range 50.

name: Weakness Analyzer
effect: When the Specter starts the turn Hidden, their next attack (while Hidden) gains +{1/2/3} Accuracy and deals +1d6 Kinetic damage on a critical hit.

active_effects.name: Weakness Analyzer
active_effects.detail: Your next attack (while Hidden) gains +{1/2/3} Accuracy and deals +1d6 Kinetic damage on a critical hit.
